package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsTrimleftSpaceTrimspace() string {
    ruleID := "strings_trimleft_space_trimspace"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.TrimLeft(..., whitespace)` instead of `strings.TrimSpace(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
